creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

You've run into some sort of resource limit during the build, e.g. disk 
space or memory usage and the jvm has been truncated.  This isn't a bug 
in the port.  You need to increase the limit (check your physical system 
limits and also the logical limits imposed on the account building the 
JVM).
